📋 Weekly Summary ?A quick overview of your social media this week. Read this first to get the big picture!

Here's what you need to know — no data science required
Things are looking great! Our content is connecting with the audience and engagement is healthy across platforms. We had a standout post that performed 21.6x above average!

📊 Key Numbers ?The most important numbers from all your platforms at a glance.

  • 📊 We've published 139 posts in total
  • 👀 Instagram: reached 106,717 people
  • 👀 TikTok: 453,868 video views
  • 💬 We received 81,663 interactions (likes, comments, shares, saves)
  • 👥 We gained 636 new followers across all platforms
  • 📈 Instagram reach grew 28% compared to last week
  • 📉 TikTok reach dropped 84% compared to last week

✅ What's Working ?Content and strategies that are performing well right now. Keep doing these!

  • Short Video posts on Instagram get the best engagement (19 posts analyzed)
  • Short Video posts on TikTok get the best engagement (15 posts analyzed)
  • Posting around 16:00 KST gets the most engagement
  • Thursday is our best performing day
  • Using emojis increases engagement on Instagram
  • Using emojis increases engagement on TikTok

⚠️ What Needs Attention ?Areas where performance is dropping or could be better. Worth a look.

  • TikTok reach has been declining recently — try new content formats or increase posting frequency
  • We're getting lots of likes but very few comments — try asking questions or creating discussion-worthy content

🎯 This Week's Actions ?Specific, easy steps you can take this week to improve your results.

  1. Create more Short Video content on Instagram — it's your top performer
  2. Schedule your most important post for 16:00 KST
  3. Try posting 5 times per week on Instagram (currently ~4)
  4. Short Video content is gaining momentum on TikTok — invest more in this format
